---
title: "My first Quarto post in Python"
date: 2026-04-08
categories: [Python, geospatial]
jupyter: python3
---

This post is written in Markdown and rendered with Python.

```{python}
#| echo: false
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

x = list(range(1, 11))
y = [i**2 for i in x]

plt.plot(x, y, marker="o")
plt.xlabel("x")
plt.ylabel("x^2")
plt.show()
```
